# T02: Audited em.ficcc.org content migration and filled gaps in about, contact, and ministries pages

**Audited all Must Migrate and Should Migrate items from SITE-AUDIT.md Section 4, fixed address inconsistency on contact page, added vision statement and church stats to about page, and added fallback ministry/fellowship group content.**

## What Happened

Systematically checked each SITE-AUDIT.md migration item against existing schemas and page fallbacks:

**Must Migrate — coverage status:**
- ✅ Service times (EN/ZH) → visitPage schema + visit.astro fallback
- ✅ Address + map → visit.astro (429 Mitchell St), give.astro, contact.astro (FIXED: was 309 College Ave)
- ✅ Pastor bios → staff.astro fallback names/roles
- ✅ Transportation/bus routes → visit.astro fallback with TCAT reference
- ✅ Beliefs/Statement of Faith → beliefs.astro with 8 detailed fallback items
- ✅ Vision Statement → about/index.astro (NEW: added "Develop Humble Servants" 3-part vision section)
- ✅ FAQ content → visit.astro with 6 FAQ items
- ⚠️ Photos → placeholder SVGs only (real photos need separate sourcing — known limitation)
- ✅ Fellowship groups → ministries/index.astro (NEW: added 6 fallback group cards)
- ✅ Contact info → contact.astro sidebar with email, phone, address
- ✅ Giving/PayPal → give.astro with PayPal link structure

**Should Migrate — coverage status:**
- ✅ Spiritual Resources → resources.astro (T01)
- ✅ Campus ministries → resources.astro (T01)
- ✅ Bible Readathon + PDF → resources.astro (T01)
- ✅ Newcomer recommendations PDF → resources.astro (T01)
- ✅ Church stats → about/index.astro (NEW: added stats grid with ~150 members, ~20 baptisms/yr, 18 ministers, 40+ years)
- ⚠️ Church history timeline → about page has founding narrative; full timeline deferred to future CMS content

**Gaps fixed:**
1. contact.astro had wrong address "309 College Ave" — corrected to "429 Mitchell Street"
2. aboutPage schema extended with visionHeading, visionBody, and churchStats fields
3. AboutPage interface in sanity.ts updated with new fields
4. about/index.astro now renders vision statement section and stats grid with CMS-with-fallback pattern
5. ministries/index.astro now shows 6 fallback group cards (Discipleship, Bible Study, Youth, Prayer, Children's SS, Adult SS) instead of "No ministries available"

## Verification

`npm run build && echo 'T02 PASS: build succeeds after audit fixes'` — all 15 static routes prerendered successfully including modified about, contact, and ministries pages.

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `npm run build && echo 'T02 PASS: build succeeds after audit fixes'` | 0 | ✅ pass | 8400ms |

## Diagnostics

None — all changes are static fallback content. Verify by checking rendered HTML in dist/client/about/index.html, dist/client/contact/index.html, dist/client/ministries/index.html.

## Deviations

Added WeChat to the audit checklist from SITE-AUDIT.md — contact page doesn't include WeChat, but this is a ZH-side concern and not blocking for EN launch.

## Known Issues

- Real em.ficcc.org photos still need sourcing (placeholder SVGs in use) — separate asset migration task
- Full church history timeline (cm.ficcc.org 40+ year history) deferred to future CMS content entry
- WeChat contact info not on EN contact page (ZH-specific channel)
- PayPal donate button has PLACEHOLDER hosted_button_id — needs real PayPal configuration

- `src/pages/about/index.astro` — Added vision statement section and church stats grid with fallbacks
- `src/pages/contact.astro` — Fixed address from "309 College Ave" to "429 Mitchell Street"
- `src/pages/ministries/index.astro` — Added 6 fallback fellowship group cards replacing empty state
